title: Enforce Minimum 12px Font Size
description: Fix 406 font-size violations across all 11 files. All sub-12px values replaced with var(--text-xs) in CSS or 12px in JS contexts. Verified: zero violations remain. Supersedes TKT-250 font-size scope.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.
